nasb.text: then I will make this house like Shiloh, and this city I will make a curse to all the nations of the earth.” ’ ”

esv.text: then I will make this house like Shiloh, and I will make this city a curse for all the nations of the earth.’”

cnv.text: 我就必使這殿像示羅一樣，使這城成為地上列國咒詛的對象。’”

ccb.text: 我必使这殿像示罗一样被毁，使耶路撒冷被万国咒诅。”’”
